text.tspan: Fields borrow from raw scan output during resolution.
wpa_cli interface_list, iw dev, ip link
Interface name borrows from raw interface output during resolution.
terminal, TUI, web, desktop, stdin, keypress
Selection input borrows from captured presentation input.
terminal menu, TUI item, web button, desktop action, CLI command
Domain defines the minimal borrowed input shape it accepts.
Presentation implementations adapt their source event to raw: &str.
Status fields borrow from raw status output during resolution.
terminal secret prompt, TUI, web, desktop, stdin
Password input borrows from captured presentation input.
Secret input should not be logged or rendered back by default.
Saved network fields borrow from raw saved network output.
network_id is used to connect without reading the saved secret.
wpa_supplicant config file when wpa_cli hides the secret
secret_kind may be password, psk_hex, hidden, or unknown.
Secret should not be logged or rendered unless explicitly requested.
